Why Choose Us

Built For Performance

Every feature engineered for the best hosting experience possible.

⚡
Ryzen 9 7900X
High-frequency cores for Minecraft TPS. Smooth gameplay even on heavily modded servers with 100+ players.
💻
Intel Xeon E5-2699 V4
Enterprise-grade VPS performance. 22 cores of pure processing power for demanding applications.
🌏
Ultra Low Ping India
Sub-10ms latency from India. Servers optimized for ISP routing and low-latency packet delivery.
💾
NVMe SSD Storage
Lightning-fast world loads, zero chunk lag, and snappy file operations with NVMe SSDs.
🎮
Java + Bedrock Support
One server for all platforms. Run Java Edition, Bedrock, or both simultaneously with Geyser.
📋
Full Panel Access
Pterodactyl panel with root access, file manager, console, backups, and sub-user management.
🔄
Free Daily Backups
Automated daily backups with one-click restore. Never lose your world or configurations.
⚙️
Instant Deployment
Live in under 60 seconds. Choose version, click deploy, start playing. Simple as that.
Pricing
